heading: Nonrecognition of gain on rollover of empowerment zone investments
label: 1397B Nonrecognition of gain on rollover of empowerment zone investments

children.text: the cost of any qualified empowerment zone asset (with respect to the same zone as the asset sold) purchased by the taxpayer during the 60-day period beginning on the date of such sale, reduced by
any portion of such cost previously taken into account under this section.

children.label: i
children.text: references to empowerment zones were substituted for references to renewal communities,

children.label: ii
children.text: references to enterprise zone businesses (as defined in section 1397C) were substituted for references to renewal community businesses,

children.label: iii
children.text: the date of the enactment of this paragraph were substituted for “” each place it appears, andDecember 31, 2001

children.label: iv
children.text: the day after the date set forth in section 1391(d)(1)(A)(i) were substituted for “” each place it appears.January 1, 2010

children.heading: References
children.label: B References
children.text: Any reference in this paragraph to section 1400F shall be treated as reference to such section before its repeal.

children.heading: Certain gain not eligible for rollover
children.label: 2 Certain gain not eligible for rollover
A
children.text: any gain which is treated as ordinary income for purposes of this subtitle, and

children.label: B
children.text: any gain which is attributable to real property, or an intangible asset, which is not an integral part of an enterprise zone business.

children.heading: Purchase
children.label: 3 Purchase
children.text: A taxpayer shall be treated as having purchased any property if, but for paragraph (4), the unadjusted basis of such property in the hands of the taxpayer would be its cost (within the meaning of section 1012).

children.heading: Basis adjustments
children.label: 4 Basis adjustments
children.text: If gain from any sale is not recognized by reason of subsection (a), such gain shall be applied to reduce (in the order acquired) the basis for determining gain or loss of any qualified empowerment zone asset which is purchased by the taxpayer during the 60-day period described in subsection (a). This paragraph shall not apply for purposes of section 1202.

children.heading: Holding period
children.label: 5 Holding period
children.text: For purposes of determining whether the nonrecognition of gain under subsection (a) applies to any qualified empowerment zone asset which is sold, the taxpayer’s holding period for such asset and the asset referred to in subsection (a)(1) shall be determined without regard to section 1223.

children.heading: Termination
children.label: c Termination
children.text: This section shall not apply to sales in taxable years beginning after .December 31, 2020
